image.description: The image Containing the character to animate with movements from the input video. Format: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, WEBP. Dimensions: Image width and height must both be within the range of 200 to 4096 pixels, with an aspect ratio between 1: 3 and 3:1. File size: No more than 5 MB. Content: The image should contain only one person, facing the camera directly, with the face fully visible and unobstructed. The person should occupy a moderate portion of the frame—neither too large nor too small.

video.description: The video for generating the output. Recommendation: Increasing the resolution and frame rate of the reference video can effectively improve the quality of the generated output. Format: MP4, AVI, MOV. Duration: 2–30 seconds. Dimensions: Video width and height must both be within the range of 200 to 2048 pixels, with an aspect ratio between 1:3 and 3:1. File size: No more than 200 MB. Content: The video should contain only one person, facing the camera directly, with the face fully visible and unobstructed. The person should occupy a moderate portion of the frame—neither too large nor too small.

mode.description: wan-std: Standard mode with faster generation speed and higher cost-effectiveness, suitable for quick previews and basic animation scenarios. wan-pro: Professional mode offering smoother animation and better overall results, though processing time and cost will increase accordingly.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp of when the request was created (e.g., “2023-04-01T12:34:56.789Z”).

has_nsfw_contents.description: Array of boolean values indicating NSFW detection for each output.

id.description: Unique identifier for the prediction, the ID of the prediction to get.

model.description: Model ID used for the prediction.

outputs.description: Array of URLs to the generated content (empty when status is not completed).

status.description: Status of the task: created, processing, completed, or failed.
